title: Daily Planner Template
scenario: Create a daily planner template with space for tasks, notes, and a to-do list. The template should include a header with the date and a section for each hour of the day. The output should be a formatted text string.
constraints: Use a standard font and headings

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the daily planner meets the specified constraints.
Verify that the tasks and sections are clear and specific.
Assess the overall formatting of the daily planner, including headings, spacing, and font choice.
